landing.hero_subtitle: Xeni AI autonomously manages your Facebook Messenger conversations, processes orders with bKash/Nagad verification, tracks inventory, creates content, and delivers sales intelligence — all in Bangla & English.

conversation.name: Conversation Agent
conversation.description: Automatically reply to customer messages on Facebook Messenger 24/7 in Bangla and English. Handles product inquiries, order status checks, and intelligently escalates to human operators when needed.
features: Smart intent detection (product inquiry, order status, complaint)
Human handoff with full conversation context
conversation.locked_message: Available on Starter plan and above

order.name: Order Processing Agent
order.description: End-to-end order automation from payment to delivery. Verifies bKash and Nagad transactions, auto-creates orders from Messenger conversations, and books courier pickups via Pathao or Steadfast.
order.locked_message: Available on Professional plan and above

inventory.name: Inventory Agent
inventory.description: Real-time stock management that keeps your catalog in sync. Automatically detects low-stock items, prevents overselling, and suggests restocking based on sales velocity patterns.
inventory.locked_message: Available on Professional plan and above

creative.name: Creative Agent
creative.description: Generate scroll-stopping product descriptions, social media captions, and ad images using AI. Produces bilingual content optimized for Facebook and Instagram that drives engagement and sales.

intelligence.name: Sales Intelligence Agent
intelligence.description: Transform your sales data into actionable insights. Identifies revenue trends, peak selling hours, top-performing products, and delivers AI-powered recommendations to grow your business.

auth.verify_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email
auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to your XENI account
auth.register_subtitle: Start automating your online shop for free

errors.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
